name_en: 《Black》🔮🔮🔮🚩🚩🚩Calfskin CHANEL 26C Hobo Bag, writing a new definition of elegance with a casual attitude! The perfect blend of soft calfskin and metal chains, interpreting a sense of effortless high-end. In the rules of fashion, the word "wander" has never been so elegant. The Hobo Bag, with its unique lazy silhouette and exquisite craftsmanship, redefines the perfect balance between casual and luxury. Design Highlights: Eclectic elegance, made from premium soft leather, presenting a lazy yet structured silhouette. The double chain ⛓️ closure design is the iconic element of this bag; the metal and leather interwoven strap is not only beautiful but also provides a comfortable wearing experience. The spacious interior breaks the stereotype that niche bags are impractical. Whether daily essentials or small items, they can be easily stored. Styling: The perfect companion from casual to formal 👨‍❤️‍💋‍👨, adding points to the overall look. When paired with a dress or little black dress, it adds a touch of elegance and sophistication to the overall look. A conquering item in the fashion world, this bag has become the first choice for many stars and fashion icons. From Zhou Xun, Liu Wen to Chen Weiteng, whether male or female, everyone can carry their own style, proving this design transcends gender boundaries. Dimensions: Length 35CM, Width 14CM, Height 45cm
